/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_surfaces.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_surfaces.dir/test_surfaces.cpp.o -o test_surfaces  ../libopen2open.a -Wl,--start-group ../opennurbs/libopennurbsStatic.a ../opennurbs/zlib/libzlib.a ../opennurbs/freetype263/libopennurbs_public_freetype.a ../opennurbs/android_uuid/libandroid_uuid.a -Wl,--end-group /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKHLR.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKOffset.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKFillet.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKFeat.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKBool.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKBO.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKPrim.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKXMesh.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKMesh.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKShHealing.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKTopAlgo.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKGeomAlgo.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKBRep.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKGeomBase.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKG3d.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKG2d.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKMath.so.7.6.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libTKernel.so.7.6.3 -lpthread -lrt -lstdc++ -ldl -ltbb -ltbbmalloc
